description: Execute V0.7-M6-B by generating an evidence-based assessment report of the Team Mode and Selected Environment pilot.
scope: Generate a pilot report document (tasks/v0.7-m6-b-team-environment-pilot-report.md) demonstrating how the artifact taxonomy and protocol accommodate a multi-developer, multi-agent workflow operating in heterogeneous environments (e.g., Cursor, Trae, OpenCode) with capability modeling, preventing state conflicts.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO physical .agent-state/ migrations. NO implementation of functional multi-agent background orchestration code or CI hooks. NO expansion to formal rollouts. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to build functional CI or orchestration daemon scripts.
Executing without an approved M6-B contract.
